---
title: "Close Reading Is Not A Luxury (Vandal Live @ Emory U)"
author: "Matt Seybold"
date: "2026-03-18"
date-added: "2026-03-18"
categories: [podcast, close-reading, literary-studies]
status: to-listen
url: "https://theamericanvandal.substack.com/p/putyourdamnfingeronit"
---

Episode from The American Vandal featuring a panel on close reading, pedagogy, and contemporary literary criticism.

[Listen →](https://theamericanvandal.substack.com/p/putyourdamnfingeronit)
